title: Feur Magic
description: Adds 30 new enchantments & 3 types of bottles for storage !
body:
![Feur magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d1d424bbfd3ca40bb5173e39b80609f71d757c6.png)

# ~ New Enchantments ~



- **Aqua Blade :** _Gives you strength under water [Weapons] [Max III]_
- **Barbarian :** _Deals bleeding damage [Weapons] [Max V]_
- **Clarity :** _Clear bad effects [Helmet] [Max III]_
- **Death Point :** _Send in chat your death location [Armor]_
- **Experience :** _Mining block create xp [Tools] [Max V]_
- **Explosion :** _Created an explosion in contact with an entity [Crossbow]_
- **Fertilizer :** _Gives a bone meal effect to the target block (but quickly consumes durability) [Tools]_
- **Freeze :** _Freezes the enemy [Weapons] [Max III]_
- **Hero :** _Additional effect when you clear a raid in a village [Helmet]_
- **Inferno :** _Protects you from the heat and sets your opponent on fire [Weapons] [Max III]_
- **Jump Charge :** _Sneak to load the effect that will give you a jump boost [Boots] [Max III]_
- **Landing :** _Immunizes you from fall damage [Boots]_
- **Life Steal :** _Absorbs the life of your opponent [Bow] [Max V]_
- **Light Impact :** _Attacking an entity creates a wave of light that makes all entities around bright [Crossbow] _
- **Magnetism :** _TP on you items on the ground [Tools] [Max III]_
- **Ravenous :** _Makes your victim hungry [Weapons] [Max III]_
- **Scammer :** _Like an assassin, go behind your enemy’s back to inflict heavy damage [Chestplate] [Max IV]_
- **Smelting :** _Automatically smelting items [Tools] [Max III]_
- **Starvation :** _Feeds you by attacking [Weapons] [Max III]_
- **Vampire :** _Absorbs the life of your opponent [Weapons] [Max V]_
- **Wither :** _Give wither effect [Bow]_

# ~ XP Bottle ~

 **Little bottle :** 50 XP  /  **Medium bottle :** 300 XP  /  **Large bottle :** 1300 XP
 
![Little Bottle](https://i.imgur.com/qXSiLGp.png)![Medium Bottle](https://i.imgur.com/dAU4n8A.png)![Large Bottle](https://i.imgur.com/dZyuWNF.png)

![Bottle Table](https://i.imgur.com/JfSoR9C.png)
